title_ja: 着席・横顔・ミラーセルフィー
title_en: Seated floor mirror selfie, profile gaze away

subject.description: Young woman taking a seated mirror selfie, head turned in profile.
subject.mirror_rules: Holding phone in right hand, reflecting herself; gaze is directed away from the mirror (looking off to the left in the reflection). Single smartphone, correct hand anatomy.

face.note_when_no_reference: East Asian facial features, soft jawline; minimalist glass-skin makeup, dewy finish, soft peach lips

hair.style: Messy low bun, long loose curtain bangs framing the face

skin.visible_areas: Shoulders, collarbones, upper chest, full arms, entire thighs and lower legs
skin.lighting_effect: Soft physical daylight highlights catching the left shoulder cap, collarbone, and upper thigh

pose.position: Sitting on the floor, sideways to the mirror
pose.overall: Legs loosely tucked and bent, left arm resting casually across the lap, right arm raised holding the phone

accessories.jewelry: Simple silver ring on right index finger
accessories.device: Rose gold smartphone with visible back logo

photography.angle: Slightly high angle, looking down at the seated subject
photography.texture: Slight digital noise, unpolished phone camera realism
photography.lighting: Soft natural ambient indoor lighting, diffuse shadows
photography.depth_of_field: Deep enough for subject and mirror reflection; slight overall softness

elements: Thick wooden mirror frame dominating the right foreground
Bed with pink and white gingham checkered sheets
background.atmosphere: Quiet weekend morning, bright but soft
background.lighting: Natural window light bleeding into the room

the_vibe.aesthetic: Soft girl, casual loungewear, authentic candid
the_vibe.authenticity: Imperfect framing and messy hair add realism
the_vibe.intimacy: Private morning moment before getting dressed
the_vibe.story: Weekend morning, quick snap before starting the day

must_keep: Thick wooden mirror frame cutting off the right side
Profile face angle looking away from lens
Seated floor pose with bent legs
White two-piece set and ribbed socks
avoid_as_positive_style: Not direct eye contact with the camera lens
Not polished studio lighting — natural window-led ambient only
Slightly casual off-center framing, not perfectly symmetrical
Light fresh makeup only, not heavy glam
